meta.title: "Calling Home" from Boot Camp & Basic Training
meta.description:
Sam Meek, Co-Founder of Sandboxx, describes how drill instructors allowed his platoon to "Call Home" after working hard.

The Sandboxx app allows families and friends to send letters and photos to recruits at basic training and boot camp directly from their phones. Sandboxx will print, seal and mail the letters and also include a stamped addressed return envelope so that the recruits can reply faster. 

Download the Sandboxx app free: https://lynm.app.link/yts

Get more from Sandboxx:
https://www.facebook.com/sandboxxapp/ 
https://twitter.com/sandboxx
https://www.instagram.com/sandboxxapp/
https://www.pinterest.com/sandboxxapp/
http://www.sandboxx.us/
